entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop, specifically Spanish bunch varieties cultivated in Asia and Africa

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where Spanish bunch groundnut is cultivated

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where Spanish bunch groundnut is cultivated

entities.name: FRESH SEED DORMANCY
entities.description: A physiological state of seeds that prevents immediate germination, affecting kernel quality

entities.name: KERNEL QUALITY
entities.description: The overall quality of the groundnut kernel, hampered by lack of fresh seed dormancy

entities.name: GENOMIC BREEDING
entities.description: An approach to improve crop cultivars using genomic information for greater precision and speed

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A population developed from a cross between two genotypes used for genetic mapping

entities.name: ICGV 02266
entities.description: A non-dormant groundnut genotype used as a parent in the RIL population

entities.name: ICGV 97045
entities.description: A dormant groundnut genotype used as a parent in the RIL population

entities.name: GENOTYPING ASSAY
entities.description: A 5 K mid-density assay used to genotype the RIL population

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A map showing the relative positions of genes or markers on a chromosome

entities.name: SNP
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used to construct the linkage map

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular phenotypic trait, identified on chromosomes Ah01, Ah11, Ah06, Ah16, and Ah17

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: The structures carrying genetic information, specifically Ah01, Ah11, Ah06, Ah16, and Ah17 in groundnut

entities.name: DIFFERENTIAL GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process of comparing gene expression levels between different genotypes

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the transcriptome to identify key regulators of traits

entities.name: TIFRUNNER
entities.description: A dormant groundnut genotype used for transcriptomic analysis

entities.name: ICGV 91114
entities.description: A non-dormant groundnut genotype used for transcriptomic analysis

entities.name: HISTONE DEACETYLASES
entities.description: Candidate genes identified as key regulators of the hormonal regulation of dormancy

entities.name: HISTONE-LYSINE N-METHYLTRANSFERASE
entities.description: Candidate genes identified as key regulators of the hormonal regulation of dormancy

entities.name: CYTOCHROME P450
entities.description: Candidate genes identified as key regulators of the hormonal regulation of dormancy

entities.name: PROTEIN KINASES
entities.description: Candidate genes identified as key regulators of the hormonal regulation of dormancy

entities.name: ETHYLENE-RESPONSIVE TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR
entities.description: Candidate genes identified as key regulators of the hormonal regulation of dormancy

entities.name: HORMONAL REGULATION
entities.description: The process by which hormones control the dormancy of seeds

entities.name: KASP MARKERS
entities.description: Kompetitive Allele Specific PCR markers validated for breeding

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique using markers to select for desired traits in early generations
